summary: Tested Estrada-Glover Gutters site end-to-end. Backend POST/GET /api/quotes work, validation (422) on invalid email & missing fields, list sorted desc, MongoDB _id excluded. Frontend renders all sections (problems, 6 services, 4 process steps, gallery, 3 testimonials, quote form, footer), hero CTA scrolls to form, empty-submit shows validation toast, valid submit shows quote-success state, mobile CTA bar visible only on mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteForm.jsx: minor — toast.success is shown before checking response; acceptable since axios throws on non-2xx, so it only fires on success.
server.py: POST /quotes returns email_sent=false in immediate response (background task updates DB later). This matches problem statement noting SendGrid sender unverified — acceptable.

server.py: created_at stored as ISO string in Mongo and re-parsed on GET — works, but inconsistent storage format vs. native datetime. Consider storing as native BSON date for proper sort semantics (current sort relies on ISO lex order which works for UTC ISO strings).
seed_data_creation: Test created a handful of TEST_-prefixed quote requests in db.quote_requests; safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_quotes.py (5 tests, all green). Frontend selectors used: quote-form, quote-form-submit, quote-input-{name|phone|email|address|service|message}, quote-success, hero-cta-quote-button, mobile-cta-bar, section testids. SendGrid returns 403 due to unverified sender — EXPECTED, email_sent=false acceptable per requirement.
